I want boy to get in the picture. Ok, say cheese! Look at mummy! Boy wants to get in the picture. Come on, say Merry Christmas. Merry Christmas. Julia. Birdie wants to get in the picture. I said birdie wants to get in the picture. Birdie did get in the picture. No we didn't get a picture right now. Uh oh. Are you going to get upset? No! Do you want another one? Okay, are you ready? Birdie wasn't in the picture right now. This is the beginning of the temper, it's like a volcano. Birdie wants to get in the picture! Ok, let's try again. Can we try again Please? This is great timing. Ok, Ben, Ben, Do Good's watching. Ok? I don't want you to freak out. Mommy. Man this kid's got a temper like you wouldn't believe. How about me and Ben? That's a good idea. What do you say girls? No Jess, Don't. Julia! Ok, let me see the toy. Cheese! Let me see the - yeah that's a good smile. Say Hi Do Good! Hi Do good.
